observation.summary: README verification commands were a copy/paste list without machine evidence.

hypothesis.summary: Representing verification commands as argv arrays lets CI run the same command set and publish compact evidence.

execution.summary: Run the verification command manifest and upload command-level evidence.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects doc drift, duplicate command ids, invalid argv, and failed commands when run mode is enabled.

retrospective.summary: The verification reader doc is generated; the manifest owns command intent and execution shape.

evidence.proves: README verification commands execute from the manifest
public CI uploads command-level verification evidence
